subcodes.first_line: From the Ocean of Utterance have surged forth the waves of divine knowledge. Blessed is he who hath witnessed and perceived, and woe unto the heedless! Verily, the Tree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ظهرت من بحر البیان امواج العرفان طوبی لمن شهد و رای و ویل للغافلین ان السدره
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @chastisement and requital, @spiritual transformation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
